careInstructions.gold: Avoid contact with perfumes and household chemicals. Wipe with a soft lint-free cloth after wearing. Store separately in a jewellery box.
careInstructions.silver: Wipe silver with a special anti-tarnish cloth. Avoid prolonged contact with moisture and chlorine. Store in an airtight package.
careInstructions.platinum: Platinum is durable but can scratch. Wipe with a soft cloth. For scratches, consult a jeweller for polishing. Store separately.
careInstructions.stainless steel: Requires no special care. Rinse with warm water and neutral soap, dry thoroughly. Resistant to rust and scratches.

deliveryInfo:
Delivery: Nova Poshta (2–3 days), courier in Kyiv (1 day). Cost — according to carrier rates.

Returns: within 14 days of receipt in unworn condition with original packaging and receipt. Exchange or full refund.
